languages.text: "Генетор экстремис Фебрус был привлечен к умиротворению обезумевших сервиторов. Учитывая его сан и предполагаемую широту познаний, риски сбоев в проведении сакральных таинств оценивались как минимальные. Однако, генетор вышел за рамки требуемых от него действий и провел над несколькими сервиторами обряды, не соответствующие парадигме Культа Механикус, заменив часть их благословенных имплантов на органику".

"Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."
languages.original_text: "Генетор экстремис Фебрус был привлечен к умиротворению обезумевших сервиторов. Учитывая его сан и предполагаемую широту познаний, риски сбоев в проведении сакральных таинств оценивались как минимальные. Однако, генетор вышел за рамки требуемых от него действий и провел над несколькими сервиторами обряды, не соответствующие парадигме Культа Механикус, заменив часть их благословенных имплантов на органику".

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify the frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risks of disruption to the sacred rites were deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded the required scope of his actions and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

languages.text: "Genetor Extremis Februs wurde gerufen, um eine Gruppe wahnsinniger Servitoren zu befrieden. Angesichts seines Rangs und der angenommenen Breite seines Wissens wurde das Risiko der Verletzung der heiligen Riten als minimal erachtet. Allerdings hat der Genetor seine Kompetenzen überschritten und an einigen Servitoren Riten vorgenommen, die nicht dem Paradigma des Kult Mechanicus entsprechen, als er ihre gesegneten Implantate durch organische Materie ersetzte."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs wurde gerufen, um eine Gruppe wahnsinniger Servitoren zu befrieden. Angesichts seines Rangs und der angenommenen Breite seines Wissens wurde das Risiko der Verletzung der heiligen Riten als minimal erachtet. Allerdings hat der Genetor seine Kompetenzen überschritten und an einigen Servitoren Riten vorgenommen, die nicht dem Paradigma des Kult Mechanicus entsprechen, als er ihre gesegneten Implantate durch organische Materie ersetzte."

languages.text: « Le genetor extremis Februs a été convoqué pour apaiser un groupe de servitors frénétiques. Compte tenu de son rang et de l'étendue présumée de ses connaissances, le risque de perturbation des rites sacrés a été jugé minime. Le genetor a néanmoins outrepassé ses attributions et accompli sur plusieurs servitors des rites non conformes au paradigme du Culte Mechanicus en remplaçant certains de leurs implants bénis par de la matière organique. »
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

traits.locale_text: « Le genetor extremis Februs a été convoqué pour apaiser un groupe de servitors frénétiques. Compte tenu de son rang et de l'étendue présumée de ses connaissances, le risque de perturbation des rites sacrés a été jugé minime. Le genetor a néanmoins outrepassé ses attributions et accompli sur plusieurs servitors des rites non conformes au paradigme du Culte Mechanicus en remplaçant certains de leurs implants bénis par de la matière organique. »

languages.text: “特级基因士费布鲁斯受命去安抚一群发狂的机仆。鉴于其军衔与学识，本以为神圣仪式受扰的风险微乎其微。然而，该基因士擅自对几名机仆施行了不符合机械修会典范的仪式，以有机物质替换了它们的部分受祝植入物。”
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

traits.locale_text: “特级基因士费布鲁斯受命去安抚一群发狂的机仆。鉴于其军衔与学识，本以为神圣仪式受扰的风险微乎其微。然而，该基因士擅自对几名机仆施行了不符合机械修会典范的仪式，以有机物质替换了它们的部分受祝植入物。”

languages.text: «El genetor extremis Februs fue convocado para apaciguar a un grupo de servidores frenéticos. Dado su rango y los conocimientos que se le atribuyen debido al mismo, se calculaba que el riesgo de disrupción era mínimo. Sin embargo, el genetor se extralimitó en sus funciones y celebró ritos con los servidores que no se corresponden con el paradigma del Culto Mechanicus, sustituyendo algunos de sus benditos implantes por materia orgánica».
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

traits.locale_text: «El genetor extremis Februs fue convocado para apaciguar a un grupo de servidores frenéticos. Dado su rango y los conocimientos que se le atribuyen debido al mismo, se calculaba que el riesgo de disrupción era mínimo. Sin embargo, el genetor se extralimitó en sus funciones y celebró ritos con los servidores que no se corresponden con el paradigma del Culto Mechanicus, sustituyendo algunos de sus benditos implantes por materia orgánica».

languages.text: "ジェネター・エクストレミス・フェブリュスは、狂乱する使用人たちを鎮めるために召喚された。彼の地位と幅広い知識を考慮すれば、神聖な儀式を妨害するリスクは最小と考えられた。しかし、ジェネターはその権限を超え、カルト・メカニクスのパラダイムに適合しない複数のサーヴィターに儀式を施し、彼らの祝福されたインプラントの一部を有機物に置き換えた。"
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify the frenzied servitors. Given his rank and presumed breadth of knowledge, the risk of disruption to the sacred rites was deemed minimal. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."

languages.text: "Genetör Extremis Februs, bir grup çıldırmış hizmetörleri sakinleştirmesi için çağrıldı. Rütbesi ve varsayılan bilgi birikimi göz önüne alındığında kutsal ayinlerin aksama riski asgari düzeyde görülmüştü. Ancak Genetör yetkilerini aşarak hizmetörler üzerinde Cult Mechanicus'un paradigmasına uymayan ayinler gerçekleştirdi ve kutsanmış implantlarının bazılarını organik maddeyle değiştirdi."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Extremis Februs was summoned to pacify a group of frenzied servitors. However, the Genetor exceeded his remit and performed rites on several servitors that do not conform to the paradigm of the Cult Mechanicus, replacing some of their blessed implants with organic matter."
